IArmadaYieldVault","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"This contract bridges the privacy pool with the yield vault.      It handles the conversion between shielded USDC and shielded yield positions. Flow: - Lend: User unshields USDC \u2192 Adapter deposits to vault \u2192 Shield shares back to user - Redeem: User unshields shares \u2192 Adapter redeems from vault \u2192 Shield USDC back to user For POC purposes, this adapter uses a simplified interface. Adapter verifies adaptParams match provided shield parameters         - If mismatch \u2192 revert (adapter cannot change destination)      3. Relayer delivers message on destination chain   5. finalRecipient receives USDC on destination chain","params":{"destinationCaller":"Address allowed to call receiveMessage (or 0 for any)","destinationDomain":"CCTP domain ID of destination chain","finalRecipient":"Address to receive USDC on destination chain","shares":"Amount of ayUSDC shares to redeem"},"returns":{"assets":"Amount of USDC redeemed","nonce":"CCTP nonce for tracking the cross-chain transfer"}},"redeemPrivate(uint256,address)":{"details":"In production, this would:      1. lend(uint256).details: POC version: Direct deposit without privacy proof      Production: Would verify unshield proof and re-shield shares

lendAndShield((((uint256,uint256),(uint2.details: Trustless execution via Railgun's adaptContract/adaptParams pattern:      1. User generates unshield proof with:         - boundParams.adaptContract = address(this)         - boundParams.adaptParams = hash(npk, encryptedBundle, shieldKey)         - unshieldPreimage with USDC going to this adapter      2. Adapter verifies adaptParams match provided shield parameters         - If mismatch → revert (adapter cannot change destination)      3. PrivacyPool.transact() verifies:         - SNARK proof validity         - adaptContract == msg.sender (this adapter)      Result: Adapter MUST shield ayUSDC to user's committed npk

params._npk: User's note public key for re-shielding ayUSDC

returns.shares: Amount of ayUSDC shares minted and shielded

lendPrivate(uint256,address).details: In production, this would:      1. Verify unshield proof for USDC      2. Deposit to vault      3. Generate shield commitment for shares

redeemAndShield((((uint256,uint256),(uin.details: Trustless execution via Railgun's adaptContract/adaptParams pattern.      Same security model as lendAndShield - adapter cannot deviate from      user's committed re-shield destination.

params._npk: User's note public key for re-shielding USDC

returns.assets: Amount of USDC redeemed and shielded (after yield fee)

redeemAndUnshield(uint256,address).details: Converts yield position to unshielded USDC for the recipient

redeemAndUnshieldCCTP(uint256,uint32,add.details: Converts yield position to USDC and burns it via CCTP for cross-chain transfer.      The USDC will be minted on the destination chain to the finalRecipient. Flow:   1. Relayer calls this with shares (already in adapter from unshield)   2. Adapter redeems shares from vault → receives USDC   3. Adapter burns USDC via CCTP TokenMessenger   4. Relayer delivers message on destination chain   5. finalRecipient receives USDC on destination chain

params.destinationCaller: Address allowed to call receiveMessage (or 0 for any)
params.destinationDomain: CCTP domain ID of destination chain
params.finalRecipient: Address to receive USDC on destination chain
params.shares: Amount of ayUSDC shares to redeem

returns.nonce: CCTP nonce for tracking the cross-chain transfer

redeemPrivate(uint256,address).details: In production, this would:      1. Verify unshield proof for shares      2. Redeem from vault (yield fee applied)      3. Generate shield commitment for USDC

redeemShares(uint256).details: POC version: Direct redemption without privacy proof      Production: Would verify unshield proof and re-shield USDC      User must approve this adapter to spend their vault shares.

lend(uint256).notice: Lend USDC to receive vault shares

lendAndShield((((uint256,uint256),(uint2.notice: Atomic lend: unshield USDC → deposit → shield ayUSDC

lendPrivate(uint256,address).notice: Lend with privacy - relayer executes on behalf of user

previewLend(uint256).notice: Preview lend - get shares for USDC amount

previewRedeem(uint256).notice: Preview redeem - get USDC for shares amount

redeemAndShield((((uint256,uint256),(uin.notice: Atomic redeem: unshield ayUSDC → redeem → shield USDC

redeemAndUnshield(uint256,address).notice: Redeem and unshield in one step - pay directly from yield

redeemAndUnshieldCCTP(uint256,uint32,add.notice: Redeem yield position and bridge USDC to another chain via CCTP

redeemPrivate(uint256,address).notice: Redeem with privacy - relayer executes on behalf of user

shareToken().notice: The vault share token (same as vault for ERC-20)

tokenMessenger().notice: CCTP TokenMessenger address for cross-chain burns
